definition: Written promise/order to pay; the general Tokugawa bill instrument.
period_note: Referent broadens over the Edo period; see logbook 2.

definition: Instrument transferring funds between places without shipping specie.
period_note: Inter-city (Edo–Osaka–Kyoto) usage dominant in the sample period.

definition: Settlement by transfer between accounts on a money-changer's books.
period_note: Distinct from a negotiable bill; no instrument leaves the house.

definition: Exchange of one currency of the sanka system for another at a posted rate.
period_note: Rate taken from the ryōgae board; see logbook 5.
